metadata.description: Design a genuinely AI-Native organizational architecture from a business idea, startup wedge, new organization, or an incumbent's from-zero rebuild. The executable companion to the AI Native Organization Methodology.

plugins.name: ai-native-architect
plugins.description: Turns a business / startup / org-rebuild intent into a complete AI-Native Architecture Blueprint: a scope gate (greenfield / carve-out / out-of-scope AI-enablement / boundary), T1 (organization = distribution of judgment x flow of context), a redrawn workflow graph, the four-layer substrate, conditional depth modules, and the kernel/future-trajectory. Grounded in the AI Native Organization Methodology.
